serverInfo.name: djzeneyer
serverInfo.description: Public artist context server for Zen Eyer, also known as DJ Zen Eyer, a two-time World Champion Brazilian Zouk DJ and music producer. Provides structured artist data, biography, events, releases, and LLM-readable references.
